mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO object_replication_task ( task_key, biz_type, biz_id, biz_key, field_name, object_key, source_provider, target_provider, source_url, status, priority, retry_count, max_retries, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskKey}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{bizKey}, #{fieldName}, #{objectKey}, #{sourceProvider}, #{targetProvider}, #{sourceUrl}, #{status}, #{priority}, 0, #{maxRetries}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM object_replication_task WHERE task_key = #{taskKey} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, task_key AS taskKey, biz_type AS bizType, biz_id AS bizId, biz_key AS bizKey, field_name AS fieldName, object_key AS objectKey, source_provider AS sourceProvider, target_provider AS targetProvider, source_url AS sourceUrl, target_url AS targetUrl, status, priority, retry_count AS retryCount, max_retries AS maxRetries, next_retry_at AS nextRetryAt, last_error AS lastError, done_at AS doneAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM object_replication_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE object_replication_task SET status = 'pending', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE object_replication_task SET status = 'dlq', retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, done_at = #{doneAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, priority, retry_count AS retryCount, max_retries AS maxRetries FROM object_replication_task WHERE status = 'dlq' ORDER BY done_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE object_replication_task SET status = 'pending', retry_count = 0, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = '', done_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'dlq'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO object_replication_log ( task_id, trace_id, attempt_no, status, duration_ms, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{traceId}, #{attemptNo}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt} )
